legalDisclaimer: Anclora EnergyScan is an indicative pre-assessment. It does not replace the official Energy Performance Certificate or an inspection by a qualified technician. Savings, costs and ratings are estimates.
providerHandoff.consent: I agree that Anclora may share my contact details and the technical summary of my energy pre-assessment with selected providers or partners so they can contact me about the requested services. I understand that Anclora EnergyScan does not issue official energy certificates and that any certification must be performed by a qualified technician.
